title: The Beautiful Four Seasons in New Zealand
passage:
New Zealand is a beautiful country and people can visit it at any time of the year. The weather all the year is fine. Unlike continental(大陆的)countries, the weather here doesn't change too much.

Summer lasts from December to February. It is the best time of the year to visit New Zealand. The long sunny days are wonderful for outdoor games and water sports. Autumn is from March to May. This season is enjoyable in New Zealand. The temperature is a few degrees lower than that of summer.

Winter is from June to August. The mountain areas(地区) are covered with snow during winter and there is a little rainfall in some places. This is a good time for skiing. Spring in New Zealand can be hot, warm or cool. The weather is quite different, depending on the places you visit. You can visit Alexandra in Central Otago and Hastings in Hawke's Bay.

questions.prompt: How long does summer last in New Zealand?
What's the weather like in the mountain areas in New Zealand in winter?
What's the main idea of this passage?
options: How to ski in New Zealand.
Introduction to New Zealand's four seasons.

questions.prompt: Which season do you like best in New Zealand? Why? Write 20 words or more.

blocks.text: I like summer in New Zealand best because the weather is warm.
Because I can enjoy outdoor games and do all kinds of water sports on sunny days.
It must be an amazing time to explore the beautiful beaches and nature.
Winter lasts from June to August in New Zealand.
The mountain areas are covered with snow during winter.
Spring in New Zealand can be hot, warm or cool.
